message: Jake
Fabar
Jennifer
Greenwich Village was bustling with people.
When I spotted the film crew and approached, the director noticed me and came over.
Hey, this time we're in Greenwich Village. Central Park was quiet and nice, but here it's pretty noisy and full of onlookers.
Thanks for your hard work.
Sorry to drag you out here.
Meryl hasn’t arrived yet.

A crowd of onlookers is gathering around the filming staff. They’re trying to use ropes to keep people back, but it’s not very effective.
It's not every day you get to see a filming set, especially not like Hollywood. Those taking a look must be pretty eager too.
The camera is set on a track, and a ton of lighting equipment is prepared on a makeshift stage.
Though there's no trace of the Bohemian legend from before, it's a popular spot for shoots.
Even though the sun is still high, they look completely worn out.
A lot of staff are moving under the director's orders. If there are any issues, they'll obviously end up shouldering all the responsibility.
The director seems really irritated. I can understand why, but I just hope I don't end up being the target for their frustration.
What can I do for you?
Yeah, it's just that I haven't seen Meryl show up yet, so I thought I'd check in.
I see.
I really thought she would already be here.
No, I have no reason to blame you.
I would be really in trouble if Meryl isn't here for today's shoot. She should know that.
Aren't you getting any calls?
Calls? I've made those countless times. But she's just not here. No, maybe she's just not picking up.
In any case, I really need Meryl here.
Is Meryl still not around?
I'm sorry, there seems to have been an accident.
Another accident? That's really no joke at all.
Meryl is quite a handful too.
If you don't mind, could you tell me what Meryl was supposed to do? Skipping today's shoot must be related to that, right?
Uh.
Hmm, I wonder if it's okay to talk about it.
I'm her partner, you know? Both in public and private. And yet, she can't say anything to me.
It's strange, isn't it?
But you haven't heard anything from Meryl, have you?
No, she never told me, no matter how many times I asked.
I'm sure she'll tell me directly. It's something I can't say out loud. Can we leave it at that?
You're being oddly stiff in a strange way too.
I don't really like feeling like an outsider.
I understand how you feel, but there's nothing I can say.
I see, I got it. Then hurry and bring Meryl here. I'll ask her from there.
Could you hurry and bring Meryl?
Is there still no news about Cindy's return?
Cindy, huh.
I can't get in touch with Gloria either, and I haven't heard anything about her condition. It's quite troubling.
Maybe you know something?
N-no, I don't know anything.
Just wondering how she's doing.
Really wondering how she is.
That girl.
Is there anyone who knows about Cindy?
Today is
you not here?
Yeah, she hasn't come.
Is that so?
You are
here because you wanted to meet her, huh?
is not a girl that a guy like you can handle.
You should give up.
Is that so?
She needs a man who can always make her shine.
Dating an actress costs money, you better stay away from that.
Even though you have a daughter about the same age as Cindy, you're still involved with an actress, huh?
You look gentle, but you're definitely doing your thing.
He's worthy of respect as a man, but I don't want to be his daughter.
As for me,
I wish I could be as close with the director and Meryl. Should I consult the director once?
I'll have the director handle the on-site matters, but I need to sort out the issues with Cindy and Meryl as soon as possible.
What does it mean that no one except Meryl showed up at the meeting place?
I'm feeling kind of tired.
They must be having a deep conversation right now, mother and daughter.
Still, quite a bit of time has passed.
Are they talking in Meryl's hotel room, or have they gone to Tim's house?
Those two would stand out in a normal store, so I think they're at one of their homes.
Cindy must have been surprised to find out she's her daughter.
It seems that Cindy's situation has been left as is.
But once they know she's Meryl's daughter, everyone will be unable to hide their surprise.
Will Cindy return to work? Or.
I want to see.
The director knows nothing about me and.
It's odd if he did, though.
Hasn't he come to the shoot?
That's unfortunate.
Bring her here quickly. I'm counting on you.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
